forgot.title: Recover Access
forgot.subtitle: We will send you an email to reset your password.
forgot.checkInbox: Check your inbox to reset the password.

errors.unauthorizedDomain: In Firebase Console → Authentication → Settings → Authorized domains, add localhost. Open the app at http://localhost:5175 (or the port Vite uses).
errors.operationNotAllowed: Enable Email/Password and Google in Firebase Console.
errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Try again later.
errors.popupBlocked: The pop-up was blocked. Enable pop-ups for this site.

firebase.emailInUse: An account already exists with that email.
firebase.weakPassword: The password is too weak (use at least 6 characters).
firebase.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Try again later.
firebase.popupBlocked: The browser blocked the pop-up window. Try again: we use automatic redirection.
firebase.unauthorizedDomain: This domain is not authorized in Firebase. Add it in Authentication → Settings → Authorized domains.
firebase.operationNotAllowed: This sign-in method is not enabled in Firebase (check Authentication in the console).
firebase.configuration: Firebase is not properly configured in the project (check VITE_FIREBASE_* variables).

errors.useAuthOutsideProvider: useAuth must be used within an AuthProvider

gate.firebaseMissingTitle: Firebase configuration missing on the frontend
gate.firebaseMissingBody:
In local: copy the Firebase keys to dashboard-react/.env (VITE_FIREBASE_*).
In Vercel: Settings → Environment Variables → same variables → Redeploy (without redeploy the build has no API key).
